channel.title: Reference on Samples / Christian Fuller
channel.description: Recent content in Reference on Samples / Christian Fuller

item.title: Environment variables
item.description:
This page uses Mermaid and a custom Hugo shortcode to render a diagram from a single source file. It also makes use of a modified Docsy theme shortcode to generate the quick reference table at the top of the page.

You can view the source for each of these in the site’s GitHub repository. See the diagram’s source file, the shortcode used to render it, and the modified version of Docsy’s tabpane shortcode.
